headings.text: We build marks sharper than the culture that demands them, with geometry, restraint, and intent.

paragraphs.text: Every glyph reduced until only intent remains. We strip ornament until the form refuses to be ignored.
The mark must cut. We work at the boundary where comfort ends and conviction begins, then we sharpen.
A mark earns its weight by what it returns. We design for the long echo — systems that compound in meaning.
A brand mark is a contract with attention. We design it to be kept — not by repetition, but by the silent geometry that makes the eye return.
